requirements.title: Minimal UART TX 8N1 byte transmit with fixed baud divisor
requirements.statement: Writing a byte to TX_DATA CSR (offset 0) when not busy begins an 8N1 UART frame on tx_out. The frame: start bit (0), 8 data bits LSB-first, stop bit (1), each for BAUD_DIV PCLK cycles. tx_busy=1 during transmission. Writes while tx_busy are silently dropped.
